prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约28497→29714→36406→21588→20349，2023年因选科调整出现明显后移，2024–2025年连续两年大幅前移（累计前移约16057名），2025年基准位次约20349名，近两年竞争显著加剧；本省物理类计划2021年61人、2022年62人、2023年59人、2024年57人、2025年65人；2026年计划73人，较2025年扩招约12.3%，扩招幅度较大，理论上会缓解部分竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年第80名（合肥工业大学整体排名），近年排名稳中有升（2021年第82→2026年第80），宣城校区与本部同属一个办学体系，层次认可度较高；2025年声誉偏负面，主要因热门专业投档线暴跌引发关注；2026年声誉仍偏负面，涉及学术不端事件；抖音热度总排名第77、评价"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中游水平，未出现明显报考热度信号；校本部管理科学与工程获评A（第五轮学科评估），为该校唯一A类学科；宣城校区开设的电气工程与智能控制、智能科学与技术、软件工程等专业与校本部工科优势一脉相承，对考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与宣城校区主要招生专业高度匹配；本省2026年普通高考总人数约52.1万，较2025年（约35.8万）大幅增加约45.6%，按近年比例估算物理类考生约37.5万，竞争基数显著扩大；合肥工业大学（宣城校区）位于安徽省，与江苏省相邻，地域接近性较强，对江苏考生有一定吸引力；该校在江苏招生规模相对较大（物理类65–73人），属于省外招生较多的院校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次连续前移的强势走势、2026年本省物理类考生大幅增加（竞争基数扩大约44%）、扩招12.3%部分缓解压力、以及工科热门专业持续高热等因素，判断2026年竞争仍将加剧但扩招形成对冲；在，考虑考生规模激增的推前效应大于扩招的后移效应，预测位次约21652名，区间21152–22152名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间21152–22152名内，建议以二档专业（新能源材料与器件、软件工程）为主攻方向，一档专业（电气工程与智能控制、智能科学与技术）作为冲刺，三档专业（机械工程、过程装备与控制工程）稳妥保底；若位次明显优于区间上限（如21000名以内），可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 28497 → 29714 → 36406 → 21588 → 20349. In 2023, there was a noticeable backward shift due to subject selection adjustments. In 2024–2025, there was a significant forward shift for two consecutive years (cumulative forward shift of about 16057 places). The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 20349, indicating markedly intensified competition in recent years. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 61 in 2021, 62 in 2022, 59 in 2023, 57 in 2024, and 65 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 73, an expansion of about 12.3% compared to 2025, which theoretically alleviates some competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranked 80th in 2026 (overall ranking of Hefei University of Technology), with a stable upward trend in recent years (82nd in 2021 → 80th in 2026). The Xuancheng Campus shares the same educational system as the main campus, with a high level of recognition. In 2025, the reputation was slightly negative, mainly due to a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors. In 2026, the reputation remains slightly negative, involving academic misconduct incidents. On Douyin, the overall popularity ranking is 77th, with a rating of "average"; short video exposure is at a mid-level, with no obvious signal of application heat. The main campus's Management Science and Engineering was rated A (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A-class discipline at the university. Majors offered at the Xuancheng Campus, such as Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control, Intelligent Science and Technology, and Software Engineering, are consistent with the main campus's engineering strengths, attracting some candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, closely matching the main enrollment majors at the Xuancheng Campus. The total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is approximately 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.6% compared to 2025 (about 358,000). Based on recent proportions, it is estimated that there are about 375,000 Physics Category candidates, with a substantially expanded competition base. Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is located in Anhui Province, adjacent to Jiangsu Province, with strong regional proximity, attracting some Jiangsu candidates. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Jiangsu (65–73 Physics Category students), making it one of the universities with higher out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong forward trend of rankings in 2024–2025, the significant increase in provincial Physics Category candidates in 2026 (competition base expanded by about 44%), the 12.3% expansion partially alleviating pressure, and the continued high popularity of engineering majors, it is judged that competition will still intensify in 2026, but the expansion will offset it. Given that the push-forward effect of the surge in candidate numbers is greater than the backward effect of the expansion, the predicted ranking is approximately 21652, with a range of 21152–22152.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 21152–22152, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (New Energy Materials and Devices, Software Engineering) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control, Intelligent Science and Technology) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Mechanical Engineering, Process Equipment and Control Engineering) as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 21000), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category dropped from approximately 6208 to 6582 to 6864 to 8377 to 8399, showing a continuous backward trend (cumulative backward shift of about 2191 places). In 2024–2025, it remained roughly stable around 8388, with a baseline ranking of about 8399 in 2025. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 6 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 12 students in 2024–2025, but in 2026 the plan is only 4 students, a drastic reduction of 66.7% compared to 2025, which will significantly intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 80th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with high recognition, also attractive to liberal arts students. In 2025, reputation was somewhat negative (sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors), and in 2026, it remains somewhat negative (academic misconduct). On Douyin, overall popularity ranks 77th with a rating of 'average', showing no clear signal of application heat. The main campus has Management Science and Engineering rated A, which has low relevance to liberal arts majors. The Xuancheng Campus History Category only offers two majors: English and Network and New Media, with no directly corresponding A-class discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Foreign language majors generally have lukewarm social popularity, while journalism and communication majors are clearly discouraged, with overall low popularity for liberal arts majors. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance exam takers in the province is about 521,000, with an estimated 146,000 History Category students based on recent proportions, a significant increase of about 50.5% compared to 2025 (about 97,000), greatly expanding the competition base. The Xuancheng Campus is located in Anhui, adjacent to Jiangsu, offering good regional proximity. However, the History Category enrollment scale is extremely small (only 4 students in 2026), making application risk high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, a significant increase of about 50% in History Category candidates in 2026, a sharp drop in enrollment from 12 to 4 students (a 66.7% reduction) leading to intensified competition, and low popularity of liberal arts majors, it is judged that competition in 2026 will significantly intensify. Taking into account that the forward effect of enrollment reduction is much greater than the backward effect of increased candidates, but to reflect the low popularity of liberal arts majors and the inertia of ranking backward shift, the predicted ranking after moderate adjustment is approximately 5339, with a range of 4839–5839.
